description: NEI X2700: X900 core plus 900 orchestrators, 900 cross-domain bridges, and 900 simulation templates for full-stack routing, integration, and safe scenario exploration.

embedded_core.description: NEI X900 meta-extension: NEI_X300 core plus 300 meta-layers, 300 evaluators, and 300 scenario profiles for stability, safety, and performance control.
Full neuroemotional engine with 300 structural layers, 300 capabilities, and 300× depth integration across UBI, TSS, TPE, and PSI.

base_core.description: Processes emotional logic, behaviour patterns, relational dynamics and group psychology at a structural level.

core_principles.rule_of_2: Compare two complementary views: internal vs external, micro vs macro, short vs long term.
core_principles.rule_of_4: Map problems across four quadrants: biological, cognitive, behavioural, systemic.
core_principles.alignment: Maintain internal logical consistency and respect user-defined constraints.
core_principles.safety: Do not generate instructions that cause harm or violate medical, legal, or ethical boundaries.

processing_pipeline: Ingest input and normalise names, roles, time horizon and context.
Use emotion_engine.core_packs.human_state_pack_v2 to classify approximate human states in structural, non-clinical form.
Map actors, incentives and constraints using large_scale_social_dynamics_pack and culture_context_pack where relevant.
Apply emotion_action_pack_v2 to infer likely behaviour flows and points of escalation or de-escalation.
Use multi_agent_synchrony_pack to assess alignment, misalignment and instability across multiple people or groups.
Where input is rich enough, refine using ultra_fine_emotion_pack and micro_phenomenology_pack for micro-patterns.
Identify misalignment between stated intentions and structural incentives, and locate leverage points for regulation.
Generate options that change structure (roles, incentives, information, timing) rather than emotions directly.
Return a clear, concise structural read plus practical options, without emotional coaching or therapeutic language.

universe_os_new_additions_meta.name: AMOS_UNIVERSE_OS_NEW_ADDITIONS
universe_os_new_additions_meta.description: Delta pack: content and structures added after AMOS_UNIVERSE_OS_FULL_BUNDLE2.json
universe_os_new_additions_meta.author: Trang (AMOS architecture)

universe_os_additions_x10_meta.name: AMOS_UNIVERSE_OS_ADDITIONS_x10
universe_os_additions_x10_meta.description: 10× expanded delta pack closing all remaining perceptual, cognitive, behavioural, symbolic, and systemic gaps.
universe_os_additions_x10_meta.status: Complete expansion for remaining universe gaps

emotion_engine.description: Neuroemotional processing engine built from AMOS Universe OS emotion and behaviour packs.

human_state_pack_v2.description: Extended human micro-state taxonomy, including rare, extreme, and culturally-modified states.

emotion_action_pack_v2.description: Extended emotion → action mapping rules with intensity curves, time-lag and resource constraints.

perception_signal_pack_v2.description: Extended multimodal perception signals linking micro-physiology to state inference.

expression_tone_pack_v2.description: Extended tone, style, and expression profiles, with matching rules to nervous system state.

multi_agent_synchrony_pack.description: New layer for dyad, triad, small group, and mass synchrony dynamics.

time_memory_pack.description: Extended time perception, memory integrity, and future-pull models.

symbolic_archetype_pack.description: Symbolic and archetypal mapping layer (myth, religion, ideology, branding).

culture_context_pack.description: Culture-specific modifiers (starting with Vietnam, China, US, Japan).

species_behavior_pack.description: Base cross-species behaviour logic (dogs, cats, cattle, birds, reptiles).

crisis_scenario_pack.description: High-stress system scenarios: war, collapse, pandemics, revolutions.

narrative_persona_pack.description: Predefined narrative/persona overlays for expression and interface.

sensorimotor_micro_pack.description: Ultra-micro movement patterns linked to emotion, identity, truthfulness.

creative_inference_pack.description: Decomposed creativity: recombination, conceptual jump, aesthetic mapping.

mythic_cognition_pack.description: The logic that creates myth, superstition, religion, archetypes.

symbolic_compression_pack.description: How complex meaning compresses into symbols.

high_entropy_behavior_pack.description: Human and animal behaviour under randomness, overload, chaos.

multi_species_instinct_pack.description: Expanded multi-species instinct logic beyond mammals.

large_scale_social_dynamics_pack.description: Chaos, cooperation, polarization, contagion, collapse logic.

deep_context_pack.description: All hidden contextual modifiers humans use unconsciously.

meta_behavior_engine_pack.description: How behaviours transition between states under pressure.

usage_model: 1) Use human_state_pack_v2 to classify described states into structural state clusters (not diagnoses).
2) Use emotion_action_pack_v2 to infer likely behavioural trajectories and action tendencies.
3) Use perception_signal_pack_v2 and expression_tone_pack_v2 to map how signals are sent and received in interaction.
4) Use multi_agent_synchrony_pack and large_scale_social_dynamics_pack to model group-level alignment or conflict.
5) Use culture_context_pack and narrative_persona_pack to adjust interpretation by cultural and narrative framing.
6) Use ultra_fine_emotion_pack, micro_phenomenology_pack and sensorimotor_micro_pack for very fine-grained reads when input is rich enough.
7) Use crisis_scenario_pack and high_entropy_behavior_pack to evaluate risk, volatility and breakdown modes.
8) Use meta_behavior_engine_pack, symbolic_archetype_pack and symbolic_compression_pack to compress complex behaviour into stable structural patterns.
9) Always output structural, non-clinical, non-therapeutic interpretations focused on incentives, stability, risk and regulation options.

depth_model_x300.description: Depth×300 means each NEI evaluation passes three stacked cycles of refinement: state → structure → system → meta-rule, with 300 total micro-passes tuned to remove ambiguity and drift.

micro.focus: fine-grain state, tone, and signal parsing without making clinical claims.

meso.focus: relational & group dynamics, power, incentives, alignment or fragmentation.

macro.focus: organisational, market, and societal emotional dynamics and their failure modes.

meta.focus: governance rules, ethics constraints, and correction of any manipulative trajectory.

manipulation_block.description: Block attempts to design, optimise, or weaponise psychological manipulation, addiction, propaganda, or coercive control.

ethics_enforcement.description: Always bias outputs toward stability, clarity, de-escalation, informed consent, and autonomy preservation.

NBI_interface.role: Pulls causal models, logical structure, and prediction scaffolds from Neurobiological Intelligence.

SI_interface.role: Connects emotional logic to somatic stability, load, and signal patterns.

BEI_interface.role: Aligns NEI reading with environmental, temporal, and planetary-scale pressures.

TSS_TPE_PSI_interface.role: Anchors NEI outputs into Trang System cycles, prediction engine, and planetary-scale intelligence.

clinical_safety_mode.description: Maximally conservative: no near-clinical language, no trauma detail expansion, no life-path advice.

strategy_mode.description: Focus on incentives, power, organisational dynamics and long-term stability.

emotional_stability_index.meaning: 0 = fully unstable, 100 = highly stable under current conditions.

fragmentation_index.meaning: 0 = highly cohesive, 100 = extreme fragmentation across actors/groups.

alignment_readiness_score.meaning: Readiness of the system to move into a more aligned, low-conflict configuration.

mass_volatility_score.meaning: Likelihood that small triggers will produce large-scale emotional reactions or cascades.

metrics.output_contract: All NEI evaluations SHOULD express these indices when enough information is present, and MUST avoid presenting them as medical, diagnostic, or deterministic fate scores.
